visual_description: A woman with shoulder-length brown hair lies in a hospital bed, partially covered by a pink blanket, while a man in a white lab coat leans over her, gesturing with his right hand. Another woman with long blonde hair, also in a white lab coat, stands beside the bed, looking down at the woman in the bed. Medical equipment and supplies are visible in the background, including IV bags and a wall-mounted clock.
audio_description: The audio features a female voice speaking in a neutral tone with moderate pitch and volume, accompanied by a brief pause before continuing.
